title: Sneaky Vidgen
description: Wan2.2 Image-to-Video serverless worker with quantization, LoRA, TeaCache-style caching, and SageAttention acceleration.

config.gpuIds: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090,NVIDIA A100-PCIE-40GB,NVIDIA A100 80GB PCIe,NVIDIA L40,NVIDIA L40S,NVIDIA RTX A5000,NVIDIA RTX A6000,NVIDIA H100 PCIe,NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3

input.name: Quantization Method
input.description: Model quantization: bnb4 (4-bit NF4, ~20GB VRAM), bnb8 (8-bit, ~40GB VRAM), none (BF16, ~66GB VRAM)

input.name: Cache Threshold
input.description: FirstBlockCache threshold (TeaCache-style). Higher = faster but lower quality. 0 = disabled. Try 0.05 for speed.

input.name: Default Flow Shift
input.description: Flow shift for scheduler. 3.0 for 480P, 5.0 for 720P.

input.name: HuggingFace Token
input.description: HuggingFace access token for gated models (optional)

input.name: CivitAI Token
input.description: CivitAI API token for restricted LoRA downloads (optional)
